name: Fall Feast- Homestyle Potatoes
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Fresh mint or parsley, chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Place potatoes in a pot of cold salted water to cover.
2. Bring to boil and boil for about 10 minutes, or until just tender. Drain well.
3. Slice potatoes thinly and return to the pot.
4. In a small bowl, mix together cream and mustard. Stir into potatoes.
5. Simmer over low heat until sauce is slightly thickened and partially absorbed by potatoes. Stir in mint. Season with salt and pepper if needed.
6. [Optional] If you like garlic, peel and slice three cloves and cook along with the potatoes.
